name: GIGABYTE C200G ATX Tinted Tempered Glass Gaming Case with PSU Shroud Design
highlights: The Gigabyte C200G is a mid-tower case with a tempered glass side panel, supporting ATX, Micro-ATX, and Mini-ITX motherboards
It accommodates GPUs up to 400 mm and CPU coolers up to 160 mm
Features include multiple cooling options, USB 3
0 ports, and dust filters for efficient airflow
description: GIGABYTE C200G ATX Tinted Tempered Glass Gaming Case with PSU Shroud Design Price in Pakistan Specification Details Motherboard Support ATX, Micro-ATX, Mini-ITX Case Type Mid Tower Dimensions (L x W x H) 450 mm x 210 mm x 465 mm Material Steel, Plastic, Tempered Glass Weight Approximately 6.5 kg I/O Ports 2 x USB 3.0, 1 x Audio In/Out Drive Bays 2 x 3.5” (HDD), 2 x 2.5” (SSD) Expansion Slots 7 Cooling Front: 3 x 120 mm or 2 x 140 mm (optional) Top: 2 x 120 mm or 2 x 140 mm (optional) Rear: 1 x 1
